title: 10 Signs a Godly Man Leads Before Anyone's Put Him in Charge
caption:
None of these require a title.

A godly man leads by going first into the cost, before anyone's ever put him in charge of anything. Save this for the guy who's waiting for permission he doesn't need.

#faith #leadership #christianman #godlyman #servantleadership
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
